title: Sanguine Wellness Day Spa: What a celebration!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - "For the third year in...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - "For the third year in a row, we’re beyond honoured to be named a winner of the Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards," says the elated owner of Sanguine Wellness Day Spa, Angelique Fouche.


> "This isn’t just a win for us - it’s a celebration of YOU: our amazing customers, my dedicated and hardworking team, and our supportive community.


"When I first started at Sanguine in 2012 as the receptionist, I never could have imagined the journey ahead. From answering phones at the front desk to training as a spa therapist and eventually taking the leap to become the owner, every step has been filled with challenges, growth and moments I’ll treasure forever," says Angelique.

"The road hasn’t always been easy - especially through the uncertainties of Covid - but your loyalty, encouragement and continued trust kept our doors open and our spirits high. I also want to give glory to God, whose grace and guidance have made this journey and this award possible.


> "To stand here today as a Best of George award winner for the third consecutive year, is something I could never have dreamed of back then.


"From the bottom of my heart - THANK YOU. Whether it’s been your very first visit or your 50th, you’ve helped make this achievement possible."


> As a small way to give back, Sanguine Wellness Day Spa will soon be announcing a special for their wonderful clients. "Keep an eye out - it’s our way of saying thank you for being part of our story.


"Here’s to many more years of pampering, connection and shared memories."

Click here to visit the Sanguine Wellness Day Spa website.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
